failure_reason: Released dead Python fallback tissue from Form-kernel served API decisions. serve_via_kernel no longer accepts a fallback callable, and household/ideas route-local helper bodies that only existed as ignored fallbacks were removed. Focused tests first failed without the kernel binary, then passed 39/3 skipped after building form-kernel-rust, proving these endpoint decisions require the kernel carrier instead of silently resuming Python ownership.
